### Post by krishna.988 on 2013-03-29
This is a known bug in Debian:
[http://lists.debian.org/debian-x/2012/01/msg00250.html](http://lists.debian.org/debian-x/2012/01/msg00250.html)

You can also file a bug in ubuntu bug repository
